fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "") == "non-llm-request")">
            
        
        
            
            
                
                <when condition="@{
                    var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type");
                    return apiType.Equals("geminiopenai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || apiType.Equals("openai-v1", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                }">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        return !String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) ? $"{basePath}/chat/completions" : String.Empty;
                    }" />
                    @(context.Request.Body.As())
                
                
                <when condition="@{
                    var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", String.Empty);
                    return apiType.Equals("bedrock-native", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || apiType.Equals("gemini-native", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                }">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", String.Empty);
                        if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) || String.IsNullOrEmpty(path)) { return String.Empty; }
                        if (path.StartsWith(basePath, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
                            var stripped = path.Substring(basePath.Length);
                            if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(stripped)) { return "/"; }
                            return stripped.StartsWith("/") ? stripped : ("/" + stripped);
                        }
                        return path;
                    }" />
                    
                    @(context.Request.Body.As())
                
                
                <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "").Equals("claude-native", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
                    
                    
                    @{
                        var body = context.Request.Body.As();
                        if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(body)) {
                            try {
                                var parsedBody = JObject.Parse(body);
                                var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", String.Empty);
                                if (parsedBody["model"] == null || String.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedBody["model"].ToString())) {
                                    parsedBody["model"] = modelId;
                                }
                                return parsedBody.ToString();
                            } catch {
                                return body;
                            }
                        }
                        return body;
                    }
                
                
                <when condition="@{
                    var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", String.Empty);
                    return apiType.StartsWith("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) || apiType.Equals("inference", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                }">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", String.Empty);
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        var responseId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("response-id", String.Empty);

                        if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath)) {
                            return String.Empty;
                        }

                        // Responses API
                        if (apiType.StartsWith("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
                            var includeResponseId = !String.IsNullOrEmpty(responseId) && (context.Request.Method == "GET" || context.Request.Method == "DELETE");
                            return includeResponseId ? $"{basePath}/{responseId}" : basePath;
                        }

                        // Inference API (Universal LLM, base-path /models).
                        // For NON-Foundry OpenAI-compat backends (aws-bedrock-mantle, gemini-openai)
                        // the backend exposes the operation under a provider-specific path that
                        // does NOT match `/models/...`. Reuse `backend-path-templates[poolType][operation]`
                        // — the same lookup the `openai-compat` api-type uses — so Universal LLM
                        // and Unified AI rewrite identically for those providers.
                        // For ai-foundry / azure-openai keep the legacy `{base-path}/chat/completions`
                        // shape so existing Foundry inference deployments continue to work unchanged.
                        var poolType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetPoolType", String.Empty);
                        var operation = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", String.Empty);
                        var needsRewrite = poolType.Equals("aws-bedrock-mantle", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                                        || poolType.Equals("gemini-openai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                        if (needsRewrite && !String.IsNullOrEmpty(operation)) {
                            var templates = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-backend-path-templates");
                            var backendTemplates = templates?[poolType] as JObject;
                            var template = backendTemplates?[operation]?.ToString();
                            if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(template)) {
                                if (template.Contains("{model}")) {
                                    var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", String.Empty);
                                    template = template.Replace("{model}", System.Uri.EscapeDataString(modelId));
                                }
                                return template;
                            }
                        }

                        // Default Inference behavior: {api-base-path}/chat/completions
                        return $"{basePath}/chat/completions";
                    }" />
                    
                        
                        <when condition="@{
                            var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", String.Empty);
                            return apiType == "responses" || apiType == "inference";
                        }">
                            
                                @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-api-version"))
                            
                        
                    
                
                
                <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "").Equals("openai-compat", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var operation = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", String.Empty);
                        var poolType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetPoolType", String.Empty);
                        var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", String.Empty);
                        var templates = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-backend-path-templates");

                        // Look up path template: backend-path-templates[poolType][operation]
                        var backendTemplates = templates?[poolType] as JObject;
                        var template = backendTemplates?[operation]?.ToString();

                        if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(template)) {
                            return String.Empty;
                        }

                        // Replace {model} placeholder with actual model (URL-encoded for special chars)
                        if (template.Contains("{model}")) {
                            template = template.Replace("{model}", System.Uri.EscapeDataString(modelId));
                        }

                        return template;
                    }" />
                    
                    
                        <when condition="@(String.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", String.Empty)))">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    var operation = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", "unknown");
                                    var poolType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetPoolType", "unknown");
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", $"Operation '{operation}' is not supported for backend type '{poolType}'."),
                                            new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                                            new JProperty("code", "unsupported_operation")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    
                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var pt = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("targetPoolType", String.Empty);
                            return pt.Equals("ai-foundry", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                                || pt.Equals("azure-openai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                        }">
                            
                                @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-api-version"))
                            
                        
                        
                            
                        
                    
                
                
                
                    <set-variable name="finalPath" value="@{
                        var basePath = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-base-path", String.Empty);
                        var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", String.Empty);

                        return !String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath) && !String.IsNullOrEmpty(modelId)
                            ? $"{basePath}/deployments/{modelId}/chat/completions"
                            : String.Empty;
                    }" />
                    
                    @{
                        var body = context.Request.Body.As();
                        if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(body)) {
                            try {
                                var parsedBody = JObject.Parse(body);
                                var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", String.Empty);
                                if (parsedBody["model"] == null || String.IsNullOrEmpty(parsedBody["model"].ToString())) {
                                    parsedBody["model"] = modelId;
                                }
                                return parsedBody.ToString();
                            } catch {
                                return body;
                            }
                        }
                        return body;
                    }
                    
                        @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("selected-api-version"))
                    
                
            

            
            
                <when condition="@(String.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath", String.Empty)))">
                    
                        @($"Unified AI - Path builder error for API type: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type")}")
                    
                    
                        
                        
                            application/json
                        
                        @{
                            return new JObject(
                                new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                    new JProperty("code", "PathBuildError"),
                                    new JProperty("message", $"No path determined for API type: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type")}")
                                ))
                            ).ToString();
                        }
                    
                
            

            
            <rewrite-uri template="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("finalPath"))" copy-unmatched-params="true" />
